body.description: The text body of the thread (Markdown)

userId.description: The id of the thread owner user

replyUserId.description: The id of the user who most recently commented on the thread

replyCommentId.description: The id of the most recent comment on the thread

replyCount.description: The number of comments on the thread

viewCount.description: The number of times users have viewed the thread

isLocked.description: If the thread is locked and can receive comments

isSticky.description: If the thread is stickied and should be displayed at the top of the page

isSubscribed.description: If the currently authenticated user is subscribed to the thread

likeCount.description: The amount of likes the thread has

isLiked.description: If the currently authenticated user liked the thread

repliedAt.description: The time of the last reply

createdAt.description: The time of the thread creation

updatedAt.description: The time of the thread last update

replyUser.description: The user to last reply to the thread

likes.description: The users who liked the thread

siteUrl.description: The url for the thread page on the AniList website

mediaCategories.description: The media categories of the thread
